name: Stability AI
description: Generate, edit, and upscale images using Stable Diffusion models via the Stability AI REST API. The industry standard for AI image generation.

auth.hint: Create an API key at platform.stability.ai/account/keys.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using Stable Diffusion.

params.name: prompt
params.description: Text description of the image to generate

params.name: negative_prompt
params.description: Things to exclude from the image

params.name: output_format
params.description: Output format: png, jpeg, or webp
